name: John Borshoff
background: Mr. Borshoff is an experienced mining executive and geologist with more than 50 years' experience in the uranium industry. He was the founder and CEO of Paladin Energy Ltd. He is a Fellow of the Australian Institute of Company Directors and the AusIMM.
